goal: Replace the fixed-price shop with the Deck Gacha (Claude Design MeowTarot Gacha.dc.html) + auto-sort + no Pull x10
done: Rewrote js/shop.js as the gacha (shop.html stays the page; nav tab + title relabelled Gacha). Imported the design via DesignSync MCP (project 9b1edd10). Features: header (gold eyebrow + Cormorant 'Deck Gacha' + sub + live balance pill); floating mystery capsule + a single Pull-120 button (Pull x10 REMOVED per founder); collection progress bar; searchable deck gallery of ALL decks where un-owned = dark silhouette + '?', owned = gold check, active = ring, each with a star/pin; AUTO-SORT pinned -> not-owned -> owned (founder); tap any deck = Fool preview (reuses deck-preview.js). Pull flow: spend 120 -> GUARANTEED-NEW random un-owned deck -> CS:GO roulette reel (50 cards, winner idx 45, 3.78s ease-out + blur, center gold marker, winner highlights) -> settle -> purchaseDeck(won) + reveal card (lift-in, NEW ribbon, confetti, Set active / Pull again / Done); tap-to-skip; not-enough sheet; collected-all toast. Real CDN back art (00-back-200 fallback full). CSS .gacha-* + keyframes. Cache-bust 20260622g -> 20260622h; www synced.
fix: shop.js rewritten as gacha; nav+title Gacha; pinned->not-owned->owned sort; single pull only.
verified: headless shop.html: gacha hero + capsule + Pull-120 + progress + search + locked-deck gallery render; nav Gacha tab
filed: roulette spin implemented per-spec + static-verified but not click-tested in headless — device-test the live pull
gacha pool = all un-owned DECKS incl. free streak decks (alternate path to ANY deck); halloween excluded (not in DECKS)
